title: Wonju, GWN — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wonju, GWN: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wonju is a city in GWN with a population of 365,000. A gateway city to the Gangwon region, known for its medical industry, traditional markets, and nearby ski resorts.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
